/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/perception_msgs/perception_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/perception_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/perception_msgs/_perception_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/perception_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libperception_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so libperception_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so libperception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
